touches.ai_summary: Inbound request from Julian Silva, VP of CS at NovaSync. Expressed interest in call recording and coaching solutions for their CS team. Requested initial qualification call.

Qualification call with Julian. Discussed NovaSync's need to improve CS coaching consistency across their growing team. Julian is new to VP role (3 months) and looking to establish scalable processes. Confirmed 17-seat requirement for CS team.

questions_asked.question: What's driving the need for call recording and coaching right now?
questions_asked.answer: We've grown from 8 to 17 CS reps in the past year. I need visibility into call quality and a way to coach consistently without manually reviewing hours of calls.

questions_asked.question: How does your AI coaching actually work? Is it just transcription?
questions_asked.answer: Rep explained AI-powered conversation intelligence, automated scorecards, and coaching workflow automation.

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sent with customer success coaching use case materials and ROI calculator. Julian responded positively, suggested looping in Sarah Ryan (Implementation Lead) for technical evaluation.

questions_asked.question: Do you integrate with Zendesk and our existing call infrastructure?
questions_asked.answer: Rep confirmed integrations and offered to discuss technical requirements on next call.

next_steps: Schedule discovery call with Julian and Sarah

touches.ai_summary: Discovery call with Julian. Went deeper on current coaching process, pain points with manual QA, and success metrics. Julian mentioned CFO Jude Klein will need to approve any new software spend. Discussed technical requirements and integration needs.

questions_asked.question: Walk me through your current coaching process. How are you handling QA today?
questions_asked.answer: Managers manually listen to 2-3 calls per rep per week. Inconsistent, time-consuming, and we're missing patterns across the team.

questions_asked.question: What does success look like in 6 months if you implement this?
questions_asked.answer: Reduce avg handle time by 15%, improve CSAT scores, and free up 10 hours per manager per week.

questions_asked.question: How long does implementation typically take? We need something running before Q3.
questions_asked.answer: Rep outlined 2-3 week implementation timeline with technical onboarding support.

next_steps: Prep custom demo environment with NovaSync use case

touches.ai_summary: Post-demo follow-up email. Julian confirmed the team was impressed with the AI coaching workflows and custom scorecards. Requested pricing for 17 seats. Mentioned need to move quickly due to Q3 deadline.

Proposal call with Julian. Presented automations_plus_consulting package at $13,700 ACV for 17 seats. Julian indicated budget is tight and asked about discount options. Rep offered 32% discount to hit Q2 targets. Julian needs to get Jude Klein's approval before proceeding.

questions_asked.question: What's included in the consulting package? Is that ongoing or just during implementation?
questions_asked.answer: Rep explained quarterly strategic reviews, custom playbook development, and dedicated CSM support.

questions_asked.question: What's your budget range for this initiative?
questions_asked.answer: Julian indicated around $10-12K was allocated, expressed concern about getting additional budget approved.

objections: Pricing is higher than expected budget allocation
next_steps: Julian to review proposal with Jude Klein

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email checking in on proposal review with Jude. Julian responded that Jude is reviewing but has questions about ROI justification and contract terms. Requested updated proposal with discount reflected and monthly payment option.

questions_asked.question: Can we do monthly payments instead of annual upfront?
questions_asked.answer: Rep offered to explore payment terms options.

next_steps: Send updated proposal with discount and payment terms
Offer to join call with Jude if helpful

touches.ai_summary: Sent updated proposal with 32% discount and quarterly payment terms. Julian acknowledged receipt and said Jude is still reviewing. Mentioned they're comparing a couple options but likes our solution best.

Final follow-up email. Julian confirmed Jude approved the investment with the discounted pricing and quarterly payment terms. Ready to move forward pending legal review of contract. Requested contract sent to Sarah Ryan for technical review and Julian for business terms.
next_steps: Send contract to Sarah and Julian
Target signature by end of week
